ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Fiscal year in which the grant was awarded */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the grant */,
  "original_solicitation" TEXT /* Original solicitation for the grant */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Recipient of the grant */,
  "award_number" TEXT /* Award number assigned to the grant */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount awarded for the grant */,
  "project_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the project period */,
  "project_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the project period */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Current status of the grant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the grant record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the grant record was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the grant record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the grant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES grant_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The fiscal year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the recipient is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the recipient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the recipient is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the recipient */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., application, report) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_documents_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance officer, program manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., finance, program management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_user_permisions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is assigned to */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the permission is for */,
  "read_only" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read-only access */,
  "edit_grant" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit the grant */,
  "edit_documents" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit grant documents */,
  "view_reports" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view reports */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_user_permisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES grant_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the expense is associated with */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expense (e.g., personnel, supplies) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the expense */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the expense */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_expenses_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reports_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the audit is associated with */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was conducted */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings of the audit */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations from the audit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the audit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the audit */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)
